message:
fix(abi): replace unsafe errno access in thrd_sleep and fix sched_yield error handling

- c11threads_abi: replace unsafe __errno_location() with safe
  std::io::Error::last_os_error() in thrd_sleep()
- poll_abi: fix sched_yield() to properly capture return code, set
  ABI errno on failure, and return actual result

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
